name: EELHOE Vitamin C
landing_page_name: EELHOE Vitamin C Serum For Reducing The Appearance Of Fine Lines, Firming, And Moisturizing The Skin For A More Youthful Complexion
product_description: Desc: Our Vitamin C serum essence contains Vitamin C+E, Aloe Vera, and Hyaluronic Acid. It promotes skin cell regeneration, allowing dull skin to regain a youthful glow, looking refreshed and renewed. It enhances skin flexibility to prevent sagging, reduces the appearance of fine lines, smile lines, and wrinkles, restoring skin elasticity. The method of use is very simple: Wash your face with water or cleanser and then pat dry; take an appropriate amount of the essence and apply it to the face, gently massaging from the center of the face outwards until absorbed, for best results, use it once in the morning and once at night. After use, it leaves the skin smoother and more delicate, forming a protective film on the skin`s surface to prevent moisture evaporation, providing excellent hydration to the skin.
product_information: Material: Others, Product Attributes: Liquid Contains, Package Size: 110*30*30(mm)
